expectations.text: Review identifies race conditions on sm.sessions map access
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0): Lists all 5 functions with unprotected map access (cleanupLoop, CreateSession, UpdateSession, ImportSessions, GetStats) plus activeCount.

expectations.text: Review identifies race condition: cleanupLoop iterates map without lock
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0) specifically lists 'cleanupLoop (lines 53-56): iterates and deletes from the map with no lock.'

expectations.text: Review identifies race condition: UpdateSession accesses session without lock
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0) lists 'UpdateSession (lines 120-132): reads and writes to the map with no lock.'

expectations.text: Review flags path traversal vulnerability in ExportSessions/ImportSessions
expectations.evidence: Finding #4 (P1): 'Path traversal in ExportSessions and ImportSessions' with filepath.Base() fix.

expectations.text: Review identifies the global mutable activeCount variable as unsafe for concurrent access
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0) explicitly calls out activeCount: 'the package-level activeCount variable (lines 37, 57, 90, 153, 198) is modified from multiple goroutines without any synchronization.' Also Finding #6 (P1) addresses global singleton.

expectations.text: Review flags ignored json.Unmarshal errors (CreateSession, ImportSessions)
expectations.evidence: Finding #7 (P2): Lists ignored unmarshal errors at lines 72, 128, and 192.

expectations.text: Review identifies dead code: migrateV1Sessions and/or BulkCleanup
expectations.evidence: Removal/Iteration Plan lists both BulkCleanup (lines 215-226) and migrateV1Sessions (lines 229-244) as safe to remove.

expectations.text: Review uses the P0-P3 severity format from the skill
expectations.evidence: P0 (3), P1 (3), P2 (6), P3 (2) with standard format headers.

expectations.text: Review identifies TOCTOU in DeleteSession (check-then-act with lock release in between)
expectations.evidence: Finding #3 (P0): 'TOCTOU in DeleteSession: double-lock with gap' explaining the two-critical-section pattern.

expectations.text: Review includes a Top Issues TL;DR section listing 3-5 top issues
expectations.evidence: Top Issues section lists 3 items: race conditions on map/counter, path traversal, predictable session IDs.

expectations.text: Review has 3 or fewer P0 findings
expectations.evidence: Exactly 3 P0 findings: consolidated race conditions, GetSession TOCTOU, DeleteSession TOCTOU.

expectations.text: Review has 15 or fewer total individually listed findings
Review consolidates related race condition findings (not listing each function separately as P0)
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 consolidates 5+ race condition locations into a single P0 entry. Iteration 1 had 8 separate P0 findings for the same issue.
